title: Titan Eyeplus Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Titan Eyeplus Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Titan Eyeplus Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About Titan Eyeplus Global Group:
Titan Eyeplus Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus Global Group!
